postCreateCommand: bash -c 'set -e && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git curl unzip wget libgl1 clang cmake ninja-build pkg-config libgtk-3-dev && wget https://dl.google.com/linux/direct/google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && sudo apt-get install -y ./google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && rm google-chrome-stable_current_amd64.deb && git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git --depth 1 --branch stable ~/flutter && echo '\''export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH"'\'' >> ~/.bashrc && export PATH="$HOME/flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter config --no-analytics && flutter precache && flutter doctor && echo "✅ Flutter setup complete!"'
